items.headline: Sea Limited (NYSE: SE) moves lower as market weighs strong Q1 2026 beat against mixed signals and insider selling
Sea Limited (NYSE: SE) reports Q1 2026 revenue of US$7.1B (+46.6% YoY), US$1.0B adjusted EBITDA and US$438.2M net income
Insider Selling: Sea Ltd (NYSE: SE) CCO-linked BVI entity sells 1,600 shares under Rule 10b5-1 plan
Insider Selling: SEA (NYSE:SE) insider sells 800 shares of stock
